_comment: 示例 / EXAMPLE ONLY. 展示解锁 1M 所需的 env 块该长什么样。不要直接拿去用 —— 把占位符换成你自己的值, 或者直接用安装器自动改你现有的 settings.json。 Shows the env block needed to unlock 1M context. Do NOT use as-is; replace placeholders, or just run the installer which edits your real settings.json safely. 两个键缺一不可 / both keys are required.
